findings.evidence: grep shows `@[simp]` on `maslovO_swapMarkings` (Gradings.lean:164) and `maslovOℤ_swapMarkings` (GradingInteger.lean:179); the new swapMarkings lemmas carry no attribute.
findings.fix: Add `@[simp]` to the four `*_swapMarkings` lemmas to match the established convention.
findings.issue: The marking-swap invariance lemmas `fullyBlockedRectangles_swapMarkings` (l.200), `fullyBlockedRectangleCount_swapMarkings` (l.210), `fullyBlockedDifferentialOnGenerator_swapMarkings` (l.216), and `fullyBlockedDifferential_swapMarkings` (l.224) are not `@[simp]`, but the parallel swapMarkings invariance lemmas in this lane are: `maslovO_swapMarkings`/`maslovX_swapMarkings`/`alexander_swapMarkings` (Gradings.lean:164,170,178) and their ℤ analogues (GradingInteger.lean:179,185,192). The diagram argument is unchanged, so each is a genuine normal-form rewrite of `G.swapMarkings.foo … = G.foo …`.

findings.evidence: Rectangle.lean:308 `@[simp] theorem symm_symm`; Rectangle.lean:354 `@[simp] theorem symm_toGridRectangle`; the transpose analogues are unannotated.
findings.fix: Add `@[simp]` to `transpose_transpose` (and `transpose_toGridRectangle`) to match the `symm` convention.
findings.issue: `transpose_transpose` (the involution, l.131) and `transpose_toGridRectangle` (l.116) lack `@[simp]`, whereas the parallel `symm` API marks both the involution and the toGridRectangle lemma `@[simp]` (`symm_symm` Rectangle.lean:308, `symm_toGridRectangle` Rectangle.lean:354). The other transpose corner lemmas (`transpose_left/right/bottom/top`) already mirror the simp'd `symm_left/right/bottom/top`.

summary: The transpose and swapMarkings characteristic API is complete and bodies are properly hidden, but the marking-swap invariance lemmas omit the `@[simp]` annotation that the established lane convention applies to every other swapMarkings invariance lemma. The involution lemma also diverges from the parallel `symm` API's simp annotations.
